summary: Backend-only live execution hardening verification completed. Build passed, runtime regression passed, worker timeout recovery probe passed, and live_execution_hardening probe is now covered by the official suite. Live exchange calls in tests are MOCKED.
action_items: Keep /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts as part of the official regression suite to guard live order semantics regressions.
Plan modular split of executionEngine.ts to reduce regression blast radius in future trading safety changes.
critical_code_review_comments: No new critical defects found in scoped hardening areas (live buy/sell/cancel/sync/duplicate-guard and worker timeout recovery).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR paths under /tmp were used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: yarn build; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-r2b LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-r2b/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-r2b/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/runtime_backend_regression.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-timeout-r2b LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-timeout-r2b/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-timeout-r2b/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/worker_timeout_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-probe-r2b LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-probe-r2b/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-live-hardening-probe-r2b/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts. MOCKED APIs used: FakeLiveIndodaxClient/FakeLiveOrderApi/FakeIndodaxClient.
rca of the issue: No failing issue reproduced in this iteration. Previously reported timeout recovery issue is now verified as resolved by passing worker_timeout_probe.
